utility_details.utility_summary: Both wi_skills and wo_skills produced high-quality reviews that pass all six evaluation criteria. Both correctly applied precision-over-fuzziness, subject attribution, warning scope, skip test, word-list compliance, and the structured ❌/✅ format. The wo_skills run was actually more thorough in some respects — it produced 10 numbered entries vs. 7 in wi_skills, and split label/description issues into separate entries for greater granularity (e.g., separate entries for cacheInvalidation label and description).
